title: codon_stats output row
description: One TSV row per input CDS pair. NaN values appear as 'NA'; positive infinity as 'Inf' (when JC saturation hits p >= 0.75 or K80 inner-log goes non-positive).

n_aligned_bp.description: Length of each aligned sequence (assumed equal).

n_codons_used.description: Codons contributing to statistics: both ACGT, neither a stop.

n_codons_gap.description: Codons skipped: at least one sequence had a non-ACGT character ('-', 'N', etc.).

n_codons_stop.description: Codons skipped: at least one sequence was a stop codon (TAA, TAG, TGA).

n_4d_sites.description: Codons where position 3 is 4-fold degenerate in BOTH sequences AND positions 1–2 match.

n_4d_diffs.description: Subset of n_4d_sites where position 3 differs between the two sequences.

n_4d_ts.description: Subset of n_4d_diffs that are transitions (A↔G, C↔T).

n_4d_tv.description: Subset of n_4d_diffs that are transversions.

S.description: Synonymous-site count. For NG86: NG86 site-counting (uniform alts). For YN00: κ-weighted (κ for transition-alt, 1 for each transversion-alt), denominator κ+2 per position.

sd.description: Synonymous substitution count, path-averaged. = sd_ts + sd_tv.

nd.description: Nonsynonymous substitution count, path-averaged. = nd_ts + nd_tv.

sd_ts.description: Synonymous substitutions that are transitions, path-averaged.

sd_tv.description: Synonymous substitutions that are transversions, path-averaged.

dS.description: Corrected synonymous divergence (Ks). NG86 → JC, YN00 → K80 (uses Ps=sd_ts/S, Qs=sd_tv/S). 'Inf' if saturated; 'NA' if input proportion is NA.

dN.description: Corrected nonsynonymous divergence (Ka). NG86 → JC, YN00 → K80.

omega.description: dN/dS. 'NA' if dS is NA, Inf, or 0.

d4d.description: JC-corrected 4D divergence (NG86) or K80-corrected (YN00, using P4=n_4d_ts/n_4d_sites, Q4=n_4d_tv/n_4d_sites). Neutral-rate proxy.

header_metadata_keys.kappa: Present only when method=YN00. Transition/transversion rate ratio either supplied via --kappa or estimated from the alignment using the K80 moment estimator on aligned codons.

NG86.site_counting: Per-codon-position: count syn 1-step neighbours / 3 (uniform alts). Pair S = average of the two codons' S values.
NG86.substitution_counting: Path-averaged uniformly; stop-containing intermediates dropped; nd=1 ⇒ 1 path, nd=2 ⇒ 2 paths, nd=3 ⇒ 6 paths.
NG86.distance_correction: Jukes-Cantor 1969: d = -3/4 * ln(1 - 4/3 p). Saturation at p ≥ 0.75 ⇒ Inf.

YN00.reference: Yang & Nielsen 2000, Mol Biol Evol 17:32-43; Kimura 1980, J Mol Evol 16:111-120 (K80)
YN00.kappa_estimation: K80 moment estimator on all aligned codons (used codons only): P = #ts/L, Q = #tv/L; αt = -0.5·ln(1-2P-Q) + 0.25·ln(1-2Q); βt = -0.25·ln(1-2Q); κ = αt/βt. Falls back to κ=2.0 if alignment too short or formula degenerate. Default behaviour; overridden by --kappa.
YN00.site_counting: Per-codon-position: each alt nt weighted κ if transition, 1 if transversion; denominator κ+2.
YN00.substitution_counting: Path-averaged with each step weighted κ (transition) or 1 (transversion); path weight = product of step weights; stop-containing intermediates dropped.
YN00.distance_correction: Kimura two-parameter: d = -0.5·ln(1-2P-Q) - 0.25·ln(1-2Q). Per class: Ps=sd_ts/S, Qs=sd_tv/S → dS; analogous for dN, d4d. 'Inf' when inner log non-positive.

fourfold_degenerate_definition: Position 3 of a codon is 4D iff all 4 codons in the same first-two-nt family (Leu CTN, Val GTN, Pro CCN, Thr ACN, Ala GCN, Gly GGN, Arg CGN, Ser TCN) encode the same amino acid. A pair-site contributes to d4d only if BOTH codons have a 4D 3rd position AND positions 1–2 match.
